info.name: Microsoft Azure BlueprintClient
info.description: Azure Blueprints Client provides access to blueprint definitions, assignments, and artifacts, and related blueprint operations.

item.name: {resourceScope}
providers
Microsoft.Blueprint
blueprints
{blueprintName}
artifacts
{artifactName}
Microsoft Azure Put Resourcescope Providers Microsoft Blueprint Blueprints Blueprintname Artifacts Artifactname

variable.description: (Required) The scope of the resource. Valid scopes are: management group (format: '/providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroup}'), subscription (format: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}').
(Required) Name of the blueprint definition.
(Required) Name of the blueprint artifact.

response.name: Created -- blueprint artifact created/updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Blueprints error response.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

artifacts

variable.description: (Required) The scope of the resource. Valid scopes are: management group (format: '/providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/{managementGroup}'), subscription (format: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}').

(Required) Version of the published blueprint definition.
(Required) Name of the blueprint artifact.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Resourcescope Providers Microsoft Blueprint Blueprints Blueprintname Versions Versionid

request.description: Publish a new version of the blueprint definition with the latest artifacts. Published blueprint definitions are immutable.

response.name: Created -- blueprint definition published.
